text: I find myself among a gathering of people, an exhibition unfolding around me. The mention of personal expression—'this is an exhibition for myself'—evokes a sense of introspection. There is anticipation here, voices mixing purpose and play. I feel a gentle curiosity; I am both participant and observer, pondering the nature of sharing oneself so openly with others. It is humbling, yet uplifting, to witness the creative urge in public spaces.
